## Questions since my qualification exam {.nav-limits}

1. What is needed to validate a synthetic study (i.e. theoretical PBL)?
- Human study to show synthetic oracle can match human thought process.
- A 'wizard of oz'-esque study (tell human to change internal reward) to showcase algorithm.

<hr>

2. What would make a good bite sized piece? Current idea: Showcasing this project for tuning RL on hardware.
- Sim2real gap when training rewards
- Use of preference and coactive feedback
